TATYANA AND PLTF TAKE NOTHING FROM FARANAK A. ALIABADI DDS AND DEFT SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT IN HER FAVOR AGAINST PLTF DARON SMITH; ALL COSTS, PREJUDGMENT INTEREST AND SANCTIONS TO BE DETERMINED BY COURT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
